app-entry-points: Structure of the L1 entry points ptr_app / ptr_app_grid (thin wrappers over their *_components builders).
constant-fold: Constant folding of placeholder numeric positional defaults (ppNum(2*pi), ppNum(seq_len(3))): the AST-sealed eval, the builtin arithmetic/sequence allowlist + ptr_register/clear/keywords public API, the ptr_constant_fold_env_get namespace-accessor load_all hazard, and the ptr_signal_partial partial-input condition.
consumer-picker-seeding: Consumer (ppVar) picker seed/clear/redraw lifecycle: has_rendered latches, identity-based new-source clear, derived-column boot races, the seed_landed gate, producer-value timing.
copy-ui-text: The ui_text copy-override system: ptr_ui_text as the validate-once copy-schema front door (NOT an L3 render piece despite the prefix), ptr_resolve_ui_text's defaults->params->layers specificity merge, and the colour->color param alias + __unnamed__ positional key normalization.
expr-safety: ppExpr / free-form expression safety: the recursive AST walker (walk_expr / walk_ptr_safety) as the PRIMARY mechanism over the denylist, the four independent screening points, expr_check modes (TRUE denylist / FALSE total bypass / list with allow_list flipping to default-deny), head-before-args check ordering, and the trust boundary.
extensibility-levels: The L1/L2/L3 extensibility model and wiring contracts: turn-key ptr_app vs user-owned shinyApp shell (ptr_server called BARE = it wraps moduleServer itself, the id= namespacing, what ptr_server returns) vs hand-assembled pieces; how the levels relate and ptr_init_state as the bare state container.
formula-capture: How formula input is captured and normalized to a string at the public boundaries: rlang::enexpr + ptr_capture_formula deparse (expr_text width=500), string vs quoted-expression input, expr()/quote() language objects vs un-deparseable built ggplot objects, native-pipe |> desugaring; and ptr_shared()'s expression-input parity via normalize_shared_formulas.
harness-tooling: Claude-Code harness mechanics in this repo: /exec-plan & /decision-to-plan input contracts, the implementable pre-commit hook (incl. the *-plan.md glob), the generated symbol-lines.json manifest, worktree layout, tool-output batching artifact.
l3-custom-render: L3 fully-custom rendering: the ptr_ui_* UI-only pieces and their fixed server-owned output-id contract, ptr_ui_page/assets/code/inline_error/toggle_code, ptr_extract_plot/code/error (isolate() semantics, needs a running runtime), ptr_gg_extra replace-semantics, the own-vs-pieces split, NS namespacing, and the no-public-headless-path fact.
llm-assist: The ptr_llm_* LLM-assist surface: four exported file-reader fns over inst/llm/ (no live introspection), ptr_llm_register's ellmer type_enum topic snapshot + lenient chat, the primer encoding the ptr_<x>=L2 vs ptr_ui_<x>=L3 routing rule, and the stale ptr_module_* name drift baked into shipped primer/topic markdown.
package-api-surface: Exported-vs-internal API boundary facts: what is @export'd vs @noRd/@keywords internal, thin-wrapper-over-*_components structure, ptr_options' single verbose knob, removed args (shared_ui=), and which plumbing (headless, ptr_server_internal) is deliberately not public.
placeholder-keywords: The formula-author-facing pp* keyword surface: the three roles (value=ppText/ppNum/ppExpr, consumer=ppVar, source=ppUpload) plus structural toggles (ppLayerOff/ppVerbSwitch), the widget+resolve mapping, the positional first-arg boot DEFAULT and its per-keyword unevaluated arg-validator, and the universal named shared= arg.
placeholder-registry-api: The placeholder registry + the three ptr_define_placeholder_* constructors: their args/validators (ptr_arg_*, positional_arg/ui_text_defaults), entry-record keys, runtime callable.
ppupload-mechanics: ppUpload / upload source specifics: fileInput reset flag, file<->text mutex, shortcut/companion textbox, env-load, auto-name, the resolve_upload_source helper.
r-name-normalization: Turning strings into syntactic R names: the column-vector vs single binding-name normalizers and the is_syntactic_name predicate.
refactor-discipline: Lessons for refactoring safely: automated dedup sweeps over-state duplication (run the deletion test before extracting), stale mocks break when a mocked fn gains an arg.
shared-coordinator-partition: Shared placeholders and the partition: panel vs formula-local ownership, coordinator host scope, the three ownership channels, snapshot/column-truncation rules.
shinytest2-gotchas: Browser e2e mechanics: app-dir+pkgload fixtures, child-process instrumentation, harness-blind native widgets, suspended renderUI pickers, false-green column traps.
source-binding-runtime: How data-source placeholders resolve and bind their frame at runtime: single-instance vs panel-host paths, the binder observers, binding-name derivation, state=NULL-at-host divergence.
test-gate-discipline: The authoritative full-suite gate: serial vs parallel, NOT_CRAN, baseline PASS counts, parallel boot-tail flakes in the seeding cluster, seeded-picker poll fixes.
translate-pipeline: The formula -> ggplot-code transformation pipeline: the fixed classify -> assign-ids -> substitute -> render stage ordering, the nested-chain->pipeline lift gates, the canonical-tree invariant (|> / %>% / nested-call produce the same typed tree, op is render-only), substitute reads the snapshot not node$default, render eval-vs-preserve modes, and the placeholder raw-id grammar.
ui-widget-construction: Static/renderUI widget building: the output-id container suffix, verb/stage param_override derivation, build_ui dispatch.
